Name: DiagramHandler
Description: HTTP request handler extending SimpleHTTPRequestHandler — serves diagrams and API endpoints

Name: +do_GET
Description: Handle all GET requests and route to appropriate handler

Name: +handle_diagram_request
Description: Generate and return an SVG diagram from query parameters

Name: query_string
Description: URL query string with csv/sequence/verbosity/lanes params

Name: +handle_csvs_request
Description: Return available CSV files as JSON

Name: +handle_lanes_request
Description: Return available lanes and sequences and verbosity levels as JSON

Name: CSV_FILES
Description: Dict mapping CSV filename to absolute file path

Name: DEFAULT_CSV
Description: Default CSV filename selected at startup

Name: +find_csv_files
Description: Search common locations for all CSV files relative to script

Name: csv_files
Description: Dict mapping filename to absolute path

Name: +find_default_csv
Description: Choose the default CSV to load from available files

Name: +find_html_file
Description: Search for diagram_viewer.html in known locations

Name: html_path
Description: Absolute path to the HTML viewer file

Name: +load_model
Description: Load and parse a Model from a CSV file by name

Name: +load_model_and_sequence
Description: Load model and specific sequence from CSV (fresh parse each request)

Name: +run_server
Description: Start the HTTP server on the given port
